mapper.select:
select (select count(1) from jst_enroll_record er left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where er.del_flag = '0' and er.audit_status = 'pending'
${params.dataScope} ) as pendingEnrollCount, (select count(1) from jst_enroll_record er left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where er.del_flag = '0' and er.create_time >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00')
${params.dataScope} ) as monthEnrollCount, (select count(1) from jst_score_record s left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.del_flag = '0' and s.audit_status = 'approved' and s.publish_status = 'unpublished'
${params.dataScope} ) as pendingScoreCount, (select count(1) from jst_cert_record cr left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = cr.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where cr.del_flag = '0' and cr.issue_status = 'pending'
${params.dataScope} ) as pendingCertificateCount from dual

select er.enroll_id as enrollId, c.contest_name as contestName, p.name as studentName, coalesce(er.submit_time, er.create_time) as submitTime from jst_enroll_record er left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = er.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0'
er.del_flag = '0' and er.audit_status = 'pending'
${params.dataScope}
order by coalesce(er.submit_time, er.create_time) desc, er.enroll_id desc limit 5

select s.score_id as scoreId, c.contest_name as contestName, null as stageName, null as deadlineTime from jst_score_record s left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0'
s.del_flag = '0' and s.audit_status = 'approved' and s.publish_status = 'unpublished'
${params.dataScope}
order by s.update_time desc, s.score_id desc limit 5

select n.notice_id as noticeId, n.title as title, n.content as summary, n.publish_time as publishTime from jst_notice n where n.del_flag = '0' and n.status = 'published' order by n.publish_time desc, n.notice_id desc limit #{limit}
